sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87120" key="proegkale/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεγ-κᾰλέω</orth>, <sense id="n87120.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accuse before</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Προεγκαλῶν,</foreign> name of a play by Menander, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.19.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
